problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations may resolve What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
